scripts.build: pnpm --filter @mockforge/shared build && pnpm --filter @mockforge/web build && node scripts/copy-web.mjs && pnpm --filter @mockforge/server build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @mockforge/shared build && pnpm --filter @mockforge/shared test && pnpm --filter @mockforge/server test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @mockforge/shared build && pnpm --filter @mockforge/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @mockforge/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @mockforge/web typecheck
